hero_subtitle: Professional care for your face, body, and confidence — delivered in a quiet, considered space.
intro_heading: A quiet ritual of beauty, refined over a decade.
intro_text: Maison Belle is a sanctuary devoted to the feminine. Certified specialists, premium European products, and treatments that respect your natural rhythm — all within a serene atelier crafted for comfort.

testimonials.name: Élise M.
testimonials.text: An absolute haven. Every detail considered, every treatment exquisite. I leave feeling entirely myself — only softer.

testimonials.name: Camille R.
testimonials.text: The most professional cosmetology I have experienced. Results that whisper, never shout.

testimonials.name: Sofia L.
testimonials.text: From the scent in the air to the warmth of the team — pure quiet luxury.
